full_text:
Zou Gui 鄒軌
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zou Gui (鄒軌)was born in Xinye county, Nanyang commandery. Served as General of the Left for Wei but other than that is unknown. Zou Gui was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
